text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come to the mall looking for a few things, but
it's quite busy today. Looks like there might be
some kind of event going on...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe they're holding a talk show to
celebrate my plushies becoming a huge hit...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, everyone is so excited about it... Including
me, of course! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. Anyway, I better grab something to eat
before it star—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you! You're the one who saved me back
then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap smiles and waves at me. That's true—I
did save her from a persistent reporter in the
past.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you, I am. I'm happy to see you here. My—

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me! What do we have here? Are you
two close?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Sorry, but who are you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Just your everyday reporter! But forget about
me—is this person important to you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Are you tongue-tied, by any chance? Don't
tell me your relationship with this person would
disappoint your fans—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I don't have time for questions right now.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The talk show starts in an hour anyway, so
honestly, I don't see the point in talking to you.
Let's go, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The way you handled the situation just now was
truly admirable! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And to think that this is the person who taught
you how to do it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, he told me I should refuse any sketchy
interviews.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she told me I should refuse any sketchy
interviews.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My fans care about me... So I need to care about
myself too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now, that's just lovely! So that's how your plushie
ended up with such a great design! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's that got to do with my plushie?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I think it's got everything to do with it! I
heard the story from the designer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Your feedback was very honest and to the point,
so they're very confident in the finished product.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...They asked me for input, so I gave them my
honest opinion.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Like I said, it's not fair to my fans if I don't care
about myself... or my image.
choice_data_list: And look where all that caring has taken you!
And look where all that caring has taken you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for the event. Since you're here...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Do you happen to have any advice to give me
before the talk show?
choice_data_list:
I've taught you everything I can. You've got
this.

I've taught you everything I can. You've got
this.
Is there anything you want to do?
Is there anything you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Do you happen to have any advice to give me
before the talk show?
choice_data_list:
I've taught you everything I can. You've got
this.

I've taught you everything I can. You've got
this.
Is there anything you want to do?
Is there anything you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Hehe, got it. Catch you later.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. Before we start, is there anything
you'd like to say to your fans, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
First of all, I want to thank everyone who bought
my plushie.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Everyone worked hard to make this project a
reality. Please treat these plushies as kindly as
you would treat me.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: We'll treasure them! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Haha...

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Squeee! ☆ You're such a cutie, Ogurin! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: O-Ogurin... I'm not sure what to say to that...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But thanks. Your words will give me the extra
push I need to work hard!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Squeeee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's authenticity resonates deeply with
her fans.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I knew it. Hearing your words fills me with
strength.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks, everyone. I'm grateful to you all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's talk show turns out to be a great
success.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Haha. Good question. But I think I get what
you're trying to say—don't worry, I'll follow my
heart.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
So, Oguri Cap, do you have any words to mark
the release of your plushie? Take it away!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Well, about that. Today, I want the audience to ask me questions.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to have the opportunity to talk with the
people who always cheer me on. Do you have any
questions?

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
Q-questions from us? Isn't this a talk show? Um...
What should we ask her?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: I have one! Do you like plushies?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Everyone in my family does too. They
asked me to send some back home.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, my mom calls the plushie "Oguri Cap
the Second." I wonder who the first is?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her response sends warm laughter throughout the
venue. She continues to respond to questions
from her fans...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Any other ques—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrooowl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Could I answer you after lunch?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Laughter fills the venue once again. The talk show
perfectly encapsulates Oguri Cap's laid-back
personality, leading to its success.
